title: Email opt-out processing assessed against a 10-day window pack and a 5-day window pack

jurisdiction_definitions.EU: Synthetic test jurisdiction; no legal interpretation is implied.

requirements.title: Process promotional-email opt-out requests within 10 days
requirements.description: An opt-out request for promotional email must be applied to the suppression list, and honored on all subsequent sends, no later than 10 calendar days after receipt. Operational evidence of the processing time must be retained.

jurisdiction_definitions.EU: Synthetic test jurisdiction; no legal interpretation is implied.

requirements.title: Process promotional-email opt-out requests within 5 days
requirements.description: An opt-out request for promotional email must be applied to the suppression list, and honored on all subsequent sends, no later than 5 calendar days after receipt. Operational evidence of the processing time must be retained.

practice_records.purpose: Lifecycle promotional email with centralized opt-out processing
practice_records.consent_method: Unchecked affirmative opt-in checkbox specific to promotional email
practice_records.consent_evidence: SYNTHETIC-CMP-EXPORT-2026-07: consent timestamp and form version retained per contact
practice_records.opt_out_process: Unsubscribe requests are queued and applied to the suppression list by a batch job that runs every 8 days; suppression list is checked before every send

control_evidence.operational_evidence: SYNTHETIC-SUPPRESSION-JOB-LOG-2026-07: batch job run history showing a median 8-day and maximum 8-day application time across the last 90 days
control_evidence.measurement_basis: time from unsubscribe request receipt to suppression-list application
